prompt:
Convert the following Q&A note into a structured JSON document.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields:
- title (string): concise title describing the topic
- date (string or null): when the question was asked/answered
- question (string): the main question being addressed
- answer (string): detailed, clear answer
- sources (list of strings): any references, links, or people mentioned
- confidence (string): "high", "medium", or "low" based on how certain the answer seems
- follow_up_questions (list of strings): related questions that could be explored
- tags (list of strings): 3-5 relevant keywords

Note:
{raw_note}
